description:
Overview:

Dumbbell Bracelets--Black stretch lever bracelet made of natural volcanic stone and alloy dumbbell, smooth and beautiful, comfortable to wear.

Beaded Lever Bracelets--With an easy-to-wear elastic design and black and white pine-stone beads, the bracelet adds a finishing touch to any outfit

Comfortable To Wear--This bracelet uses frosted stones, flint white turquoise and alloy dumbbells. You can pick any of them.

Perfect Gift--Lever Braceletare the perfect anniversary gift, mother's day gift, graduation gift, Christmas gift, engagement gift, Valentine's day gift, thanksgiving gift, or wedding gift to show how important they are in your heart


Product information:

Material: Alloy

Bracelet length: 18cm

 Weight: about 20g

 Material: volcanic stone, frosted, alloy 

Packing: separate transparent opp packaging

Package Content：

1*Bracelet
